rationale: Faithful AS-IS implementation of frozen v15 Task 4a (AM-40 PACKAGE_ROOTS + AM-41 profile) with no reinterpretation and no scope expansion. (a) inventory.mjs commits exact sorted PACKAGE_ROOTS (five spine packages) + explicit PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE (three siblings), DOC_ROOTS + docs/runs and self-weave exclusions, sorted CONTRACT_FILES (D31), LEDGER_SOURCES/RUN_SOURCES as closed exact reviewed sets, five weaver ids + integer versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS deep-equal to the frozen normative table (unit-proved), and LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS deep-frozen with exact keys {module,node:module} and values ["builtinModules","isBuiltin"] (deep-equal/deep-freeze/mutation units). Completeness unit discovers every tracked package.json dir and requires discovered == PACKAGE_ROOTS ∪ EXCLUDE with empty intersection. (b) Per D17/AM-17 only git+code WEAVER_IMPL_FILES closures are committed; every named file exists; test-closure proves equality to derived closures via shared classifier/resolver and rejects missing/extra/nonexistent. (c) util.mjs exports the ONE D33 classifyModuleLoads + resolveRelativeSpecifier (AM-34 test 19 proves single definition and shared use by deriveAcceptedClosure and code.mjs), dependency-free comment/string-aware lexer with AM-41 fail-closed PROFILE_DIAGNOSTIC on exact out-of-profile set b1–b6 (one optional leading shebang admitted), Phase-1 export scanner (export function|async function|const|class), real-file walker rejecting root escape and symlinked input, D26/D29 counted-iterator (count only on completed consumption; accounting only via driver-held accessor), D21 physicalContainment (lstat every original uncollapsed component, reject symlink components, never follow to decide), and no-shell git wrapper permitting only the exact subcommands/arg shapes with env neutralization. (d) test-closure derives committed closures with the shared tools, covers every accepted form via form-only fixtures (named/side-effect/export-from/export-star/export-*as/dynamic/require/module.require including keyword-named aliases and whitespace), recursion/cycles/unreachable-literal-dynamic, permitted merkle-dag traversal, and all fatal/no-edge modes. (e) git.mjs uses exactly `git log -S<symbol> --format=%H --reverse -- <path>` and `git log --format=%H --reverse -- <path>`, first result, source_ref git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warns; validates own inputs before argv splice; exhausts both counted sources. (f) code.mjs emits depends-on across all four endpoint shapes with symbol- vs file-level threading, unrepresentable-consumer ONLY for unresolvable/outside-roots specifiers, unused/comment/string emit no edge, dedup; uses shared resolver. Zero runtime deps, ESM, node:/clotho-relative/merkle-dag/vendor only, spine read-only, confined to clotho/, deterministic gate finalStatus=meets with green check+test-all. Later tasks (4b test/doc/ledger weavers, Task 5 orchestrator/D34) correctly deferred. Stake signature: approve.
